taxonomy: Dicalix laurinus is classified within the family Polygalaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as milkworts. This family is part of the order Polygalales, a group of flowering plants characterized by their unique flowers and seed pods. Dicalix laurinus is native to Australia, where it grows as a shrub or small tree. The classification of Dicalix laurinus is also reflected in its botanical name, which consists of two parts: the genus name Dicalix and the species name laurinus. Further classification of Dicalix laurinus places it within the subfamily Polygaloideae.
